items.en: The pharmacy is open until lunch break.
I need medicine for a headache.
Take this medicine after eating.
Do you have vitamins?
The pharmacist gave me advice.
Does this medicine require a prescription?
Please give me a plaster.

items.kk: Дене қызуын өлшейтін термометр бар ма?
items.en: Do you have a thermometer to measure body temperature?
This cream is good for the skin.
Do not exceed the dosage.
The storm broke the windows.
Lightning and thunder began.
The fog was so thick the road couldn't be seen.
The blizzard covered the streets with snow.
The drought damaged the crops.
The flood destroyed houses.
Before a storm, the weather calms down.
Hail is falling.
A strong hot wind raised dust.
The earthquake happened at night.
The bus was five minutes late at the stop.
There was no seat on the metro.
The traffic was heavily jammed.
The driver stopped at the traffic light.
You can buy a ticket from a machine.
I called a taxi using an app.
The trolleybus runs on electric wires.
Pay attention to the road sign.
Pedestrians stopped at the crossing sign.
The parking lot is full.
